title: Lotodes martini
taxonomy: Lotodes martini is classified as a genus within the family Coralliidae, which consists of coral species. More specifically, it belongs to the phylum Cnidaria, the class Hydrozoa, and the order Leptothecata. This classification places Lotodes martini among the marine organisms that are characterized by their stinging cells, or cnidocytes. The species is a type of hydroid, a colonial, sessile animal that filters food particles from the surrounding water. Further research may provide more detailed information on its classification within the phylum Cnidaria.
